title: desmotrichum bicostatum
intro: Desmotrichum bicostatum is a species of liverwort, a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the class Marchantiopsida. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Desmotrichum bicostatum include the potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve liver function, as well as its use as an anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Desmotrichum bicostatum are typically made by drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures.
